R1.description: Implement Markdown-to-link extraction and XiaoYuzhou filtering CLI flow
R1.accept: CLI accepts `--md-file`, extracts links from Markdown syntax and plain URLs, and filters to XiaoYuzhou domains.

R2.description: Implement text-first retrieval with audio fallback and local Whisper transcription
R2.accept: If webpage text is sufficient it is used directly; if insufficient, audio is downloaded and transcribed via local Whisper command.

R3.description: Implement DeepSeek summarization and output persistence to target directory
R3.accept: CLI calls DeepSeek with source text, writes per-episode `summary.md`, and writes `all_summaries.md`.

R4.description: Add usage documentation and runtime dependency manifest
R4.accept: Repository includes clear setup and run instructions, required environment variables, and CLI parameter examples.

R5.accept: Add _format_elapsed() and _log_phase() helper functions to main.py
steps: python3 -m py_compile main.py exits with code 0

steps: python3 -m py_compile main.py exits with code 0

steps: python3 -m py_compile main.py exits with code 0
